leadText: The Smart Candy L (Japanese: ちしきのアメＬ Knowledge Candy L) is a type of Candy introduced in Generation VII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Lv. 30 or higher Pokémon, it increases that Pokémon's Special Attack by 1 AV , up until it has reached 100 AVs in Special Attack.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A big candy that is packed with energy. When given to a Pokémon Lv. 30 or higher, it will increase that Pokémon's Sp. Attack.
